title: Market products and services
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Market products and services demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Analyse market information

pcs.text: Identify, research and analyse existing or new markets for existing or new products or services, using techniques to ensure reliable data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, research and analyse existing or new markets for existing or new products or services, using techniques to ensure reliable data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, research and analyse existing or new markets for existing or new products or services, using techniques to ensure reliable data.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse past trends and developments to determine market variability and associated risks.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and evaluate competing products and determine strengths and weaknesses of own products.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor market environment to ensure information is current and reliable.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the legal, ethical and environmental constraints of the markets and their effect on the enterprise.

pcs.text: Identify product specifications that suit market requirements and price advantage at the time

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify product specifications that suit market requirements and price advantage at the time.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Present clear and concise information to the enterprise management team.
